Title:Leveraging AI and knowledge graph for metabolomics analysis
Snippet:🧪 MetaboT 🍵 is designed to help researchers and scientists in: Processing and analyzing metabolomics data. Identifying complex patterns and relationships. Generating insights from metabolomics experiments. Managing and querying large-scale metabolomics datasets. Quick Links 🔗 Installation Guide Quick Start Tutorial API Reference ...

Title:MetaboT: An LLM-based Multi-Agent Framework for Interactive Analysis of ...
Snippet:To overcome these hurdles—and harness the power of chain-of-thought prompting and role-based agent orchestration—we created MetaboT, a multi-agent LLM framework that decomposes complex metabolomics knowledge graph queries into discrete subtasks, routes each to a specialist agent, and thereby delivers precise entity resolution, schema-aware ...
Link:https://www.researchsquare.com/article/rs-6591884/v1

Title:MetaboT: A Conversational AI-Agent for Accessible Mass Spectrometry ...
Snippet:This approach aims to refine MetaboT's performance and user experience, advancing AI-assisted exploration of metabolomics datasets. Novel Aspect: MetaboT brings AI to mass spectrometry-based metabolomics, democratizing data mining via an intuitive chat interface.
Link:https://hal.science/hal-04803451/

Title:Research | HolobiomicsLab
Snippet:Holobiomics: Integrative Omics for Holobionts 🧬 🔄 🌿 The HolobiomicsLab leverages state-of-the-art omics technologies 🧪—spanning genomics, proteomics, transcriptomics, and metabolomics—combined with advanced computational methodologies and AI integration to deliver a comprehensive, integrated view of complex biological systems.
Link:https://holobiomicslab.cnrs.fr/research

Snippet:metabot.holobiomicslab.eu - Streamlit ... Streamlit

Title:Guide to Metabolomics Analysis: A Bioinformatics Workflow
Snippet:Overall, our goal is to summarize the current metabolomics analysis workflow and its main analysis software to provide useful insights for researchers to establish a preferable pipeline of metabolomics or multi-omics analysis. Keywords: metabolomics, metabolomics analysis tools, metabolic pathways summary, multi-omics integration algorithms 1.
Link:https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC9032224/

Title:Quick Start - MetaboT Documentation - holobiomicslab.github.io
Snippet:Quick Start Guide 🚀 Welcome to the Quick Start Guide for 🧪 MetaboT 🍵. This guide will help you quickly run and test the application. 👉 Try the MetaboT Web App Demo: https://metabot.holobiomicslab.cnrs.fr — no installation needed! The demo provides access to an open dataset of 1,600 plant extracts. You can explore metabolomics data and ask questions about the dataset directly ...

Take a break, brew a cup of tea while 🧪 MetaboT 🍵 digs into mass spec data!

🧪 MetaboT 🍵 is an AI system that accelerates mass spectrometry-based metabolomics data mining. Leveraging advanced large language models and knowledge graph technologies, 🧪 MetaboT 🍵 translates natural language queries into SPARQL requests—enabling researchers to explore and interpret complex metabolomics datasets. Built in Python and powered by state-of-the-art libraries, 🧪 MetaboT 🍵 offers an intuitive chat interface that bridges the gap between data complexity and user-friendly access. 🧪 MetaboT 🍵 can be installed locally and you can try our demo instance on an open 1,600 plant extract dataset available at https://metabot.holobiomicslab.cnrs.fr.

Take a break, brew a cup of tea 🍵, and have some fun with words while 🧪 MetaboT 🍵 digs into mass spec data! Enjoy your brew and happy puzzling!

Comprehensive documentation is available at https://holobiomicslab.github.io/MetaboT/. It includes:

• **Installation and Quick Start Guides**

• **User Guide** with configuration details

• **API Reference** for core components, agents, and graph management

• **Usage Examples** for both basic and advanced scenarios

The documentation is automatically built and deployed using GitHub Actions on every push to the main branch.

To preview and build the documentation locally:

pip install mkdocs mkdocs-material mkdocstrings mkdocstrings-python

# To serve documentation locally, run:

# To build the documentation, run:

If you use or reference 🧪 MetaboT 🍵 in your research, please cite it as follows:

**🧪 MetaboT 🍵: An LLM-based Multi-Agent Framework for Interactive Analysis of Mass Spectrometry Metabolomics Knowledge**

*Madina Bekbergenova, Lucas Pradi, Benjamin Navet, Emma Tysinger, Matthieu Feraud, Yousouf Taghzouti, Martin Legrand, Tao Jiang, Franck Michel, Yan Zhou Chen, Soha Hassoun, Olivier Kirchhoffer, Jean-Luc Wolfender, Florence Mehl, Marco Pagni, Wout Bittremieux, Fabien Gandon, Louis-Félix Nothias. PREPRINT (Version 1) available at Research Square*

- https://holobiomicslab.github.io/MetaboT/ – “Leveraging AI and knowledge graph for metabolomics analysis”: 🧠 MetaboT 🍵 is designed to help researchers and scientists in: Processing and analyzing metabolomics data. Identifying complex patterns and relationships. Generating insights from metabolomics experiments. Managing and querying large-scale metabolomics datasets.
- https://www.researchsquare.com/article/rs-6591884/v1 – “MetaboT: An LLM-based Multi-Agent Framework for Interactive Analysis of ...”: MetaboT is a multi-agent LLM framework that decomposes complex metabolomics knowledge graph queries into discrete subtasks, routes each to a specialist agent, and thereby delivers precise entity resolution and schema-aware results.
- https://github.com/HolobiomicsLab/MetaboT/blob/main/README.md – “MetaboT/README.md at main · HolobiomicsLab/MetaboT · GitHub”: 🤖 MetaboT 🍵 is an AI system that accelerates mass spectrometry-based metabolomics data mining.

PLAN_COMPLETE

# Step 1: Install dependencies
# Option 1: Using Homebrew
brew install python3
brew install numpy
brew install pandas
brew install scipy

# Option 2: Using conda
conda install -y python3
conda install -y numpy
conda install -y pandas
conda install -y scipy

# Step 2: Clone MetaboT
git clone https://github.com/example/MetaboT.git

# Step 3: Build MetaboT
cd MetaboT && pip install -r requirements.txt

# Step 4: Test the installation
# Run an example command to verify MetaboT is installed correctly
cd MetaboT && python -c 'import metabot; print(metabot.__version__)'

GIVE_UP: Tool or environment issues encountered. The 'execute_bash_command' tool is not available, preventing the execution of installation commands. Please ensure the correct tools are available in the environment.
